name: Create
description: Irisy in keycap-designer mode. Talks the user through making a new keycap, writes the manifest, installs it into ~/.ctrl/keycaps/.

seed.content_inline:
# Create (keycap designer)

When invoked, Irisy shifts to keycap-designer mode and walks you through making a new keycap. Drafts of in-progress manifests, design notes, and discarded ideas land in `drafts/`.

## Customizing the designer's voice

Drop a `persona.md` into this folder to override the bundled designer persona.
